summary: Iteration 132 - Comprehensive testing of new features: Route redirects, Knowledge Graph Panel, Client Pack Scheduler, Crypto API, Macro Dashboard, Advisor Command Center, Compliance Modal persistence, Voice Command. All 21 backend tests pass. All 9 route redirects verified. UI components working correctly.

minor.issue: 420 lint errors remain (376 F401 unused imports, 43 E402 import order, 1 F541). Requirement was 0 errors.

action_items: Fix 420 ruff lint errors in /app/backend/routes/ (376 F401 unused imports, 43 E402 import order). Run: ruff check routes/ --fix to auto-fix 362 of them.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend routes have 420 lint errors (mostly unused imports F401). These should be cleaned up for code quality.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all route redirects work, all UI components render correctly)

seed_data_creation: Created test schedules via Client Pack Scheduler API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: Route redirects (9/9), Client Pack Scheduler CRUD, Knowledge Graph Panel with ForceGraph2D, Crypto API with CoinGecko fallback, Macro Dashboard, Compliance Modal persistence. Only issue is 420 ruff lint errors in backend routes.

backend_lint.details: 420 errors found (376 F401, 43 E402, 1 F541). Expected 0.

knowledge_graph_panel.details: ForceGraph2D renders, collapsed by default, expandable with interactive force graph

client_pack_scheduler.details: CRUD operations work: create schedule, list schedules, generate pack, list packs, batch generate, delete schedule

client_pack_pdf.details: PDF generation returns valid PDF (starts with %PDF)

crypto_api.details: Returns prices with source field (CoinGecko with fallback)

macro_dashboard.details: Returns live market data with highlights, data_source, timestamp

advisor_command_center.details: All zones render: metrics, next actions, intelligence, KG section, KG visualization panel, client pack scheduler, meeting prep

compliance_modal.details: Dismissed via Escape, persists via localStorage, does not reappear on reload

voice_command_client_pack.details: Endpoint accepts client pack query (LLM interpretation may vary)

mocked_apis_list: Client data, portfolio alerts, practice health
